ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"other","Summary":"Script to find dining.html additions in transcript.jsonl."}
CodeContent:
"import json

path = "/Users/pravinsam/.gemini/antigravity-ide/brain/353b6a43-7fa1-4a16-b18d-9ef0cd6ad7d2/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl"
with open(path, "r") as f:
    for line in f:
        data = json.loads(line)
        content = data.get("content", "")
        if "dining.html" in str(content):
            # Check if it has "+  <div" or similar dining additions
            if "C Salt" in str(content):
                # If there are additions of C Salt (meaning '+' signs)
                if "+ " in str(content) or "+" in str(content):
                    print(f"Step {data.get('step_index')}: type={data.get('type')}, source={data.get('source')}, created_at={data.get('created_at')}")
                    # Save the full content to a file
                    with open(f"dining_addition_step_{data.get('step_index')}.txt", "w") as out_f:
                        out_f.write(content)
                    print(f"Saved step {data.get('step_index')} content to file.")
"
Description: "Find steps where C Salt/dining content was added/written in transcript.jsonl"
